description_long: This is a muscular adult male boxer with a defined physique, standing upright with both arms slightly bent and fists clenched in front of his body. He is shirtless, wearing high-waisted boxing trunks adorned with a star and hammer-and-sickle motif, and the name 'DRAGO' on the waistband. His hands are protected by large boxing gloves, and he wears tall, laced boxing boots that reach above the ankles. The character has a short, flat-top hairstyle and a stern facial expression. The overall appearance is that of a professional athlete, ready for a boxing match, with attire and accessories typical of a competitive boxer. The visual style is stylized but realistic, with attention to anatomical detail and clothing texture.
description: A muscular adult male boxer in trunks, gloves, and tall boxing boots, standing upright and ready for a match. He has a short flat-top hairstyle and a stern expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the boxer's muscular chest, clenched fists, and detailed boxing trunks with motifs and the name 'DRAGO' visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the boxer's profile, arm musculature, and the side design of the trunks and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, shoulder muscles, and the back design of the trunks, including a prominent star.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the boxer's profile, glove, and the side pattern of the trunks and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: boxing trunks, boxing gloves, tall laced boxing boots
